message:
test(proptest): expand cx_capabilities, dpor_schedule, error_clustering, mmap, restore_layout, session_restore_config, and simd_scan property test suites

Major expansion of seven existing property test suites, continuing the
systematic proptest hardening campaign across frankenterm-core:

proptest_cx_capabilities.rs:
- Add RuntimeTuning default validity, structural equality, RuntimePreset
  Debug/Clone/Copy/PartialEq tests
- Add CxRuntimeBuilder configuration roundtrip, with_cx nested depth
  verification, spawn_with_cx concurrent fan-out, try_spawn_with_cx
  error propagation

proptest_dpor_schedule.rs:
- Expand from basic schedule generation to comprehensive DPOR (Dynamic Partial
  Order Reduction) coverage: schedule determinism, transition ordering,
  backtracking point selection, sleep set optimization, race detection symmetry,
  state space pruning, maximal causality reduction

proptest_error_clustering.rs:
- Add cluster merge distance thresholds, temporal window grouping, error
  fingerprint stability, cluster splitting on divergent patterns, severity
  level ordering, deduplication within time windows

proptest_mmap.rs:
- Add mmap region alignment verification, overlapping region detection, page
  boundary snapping, large allocation guard page placement, zero-fill behavior
  on fresh mappings, unmap idempotency, remap size preservation

proptest_restore_layout.rs:
- Major expansion covering: split tree serialization roundtrip, nested split
  reconstruction, pane z-order preservation, tab group restore ordering,
  workspace geometry validation, floating pane position restore, zoom state
  persistence, split ratio precision, empty workspace handling

proptest_session_restore_config.rs:
- Add config merge precedence (CLI > env > file > defaults), boolean flag
  normalization, path expansion with tilde and env vars, retention policy
  validation, config serde stability across versions

proptest_simd_scan.rs:
- Add SIMD scan correctness vs scalar baseline, alignment boundary handling,
  partial vector tail processing, multi-pattern interleaving, case sensitivity
  toggle, null byte transparency, large input streaming

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
